heading: Availability Zones and Supported Regions
body:
| Azure Region    | Location                | Atlas Region       | Free Support | Flex Support | M10+ Support | Availability Zones |
| --------------- | ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------ | ------------ | ------------ | ------------------ |
| centralus       | Iowa, USA               | US\_CENTRAL        |              |              |              |                    |
| eastus          | Virginia (East US)      | US\_EAST           |              |              |              |                    |
| eastus2         | Virginia, USA           | US\_EAST\_2        |              |              |              |                    |
| northcentralus  | Illinois, USA           | US\_NORTH\_CENTRAL |              |              |              |                    |
| westus          | California, USA         | US\_WEST           |              |              |              |                    |
| westus2         | Washington, USA         | US\_WEST\_2        |              |              |              |                    |
| westus3         | Arizona, USA            | US\_WEST\_3        |              |              |              |                    |
| westcentralus   | Wyoming, USA            | US\_WEST\_CENTRAL  |              |              |              |                    |
| southcentralus  | Texas, USA              | US\_SOUTH\_CENTRAL |              |              |              |                    |
| brazilsouth     | Sao Paulo, Brazil       | BRAZIL\_SOUTH      |              |              |              |                    |
| brazilsoutheast | Rio de Janeiro, Brazil  | BRAZIL\_SOUTHEAST  |              |              |              |                    |
| canadaeast      | Quebec City, QC, Canada | CANADA\_EAST       |              |              |              |                    |
| canadacentral   | Toronto, ON, Canada     | CANADA\_CENTRAL    |              |              |              |                    |
| chilecentral    | Santiago                | CHILE\_CENTRAL     |              |              |              |                    |
| mexicocentral   | Querétaro State, Mexico | MEXICO\_CENTRAL    |              |              |              |                    |

| Azure Region    | Location                | Atlas Region       | NVMe Support | Extended Storage/IOPS |
| --------------- | ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------ | --------------------- |
| centralus       | Iowa, USA               | US\_CENTRAL        |              |                       |
| eastus          | Virginia (East US)      | US\_EAST           |              |                       |
| eastus2         | Virginia, USA           | US\_EAST\_2        |              |                       |
| northcentralus  | Illinois, USA           | US\_NORTH\_CENTRAL |              |                       |
| westus          | California, USA         | US\_WEST           |              |                       |
| westus2         | Washington, USA         | US\_WEST\_2        |              |                       |
| westus3         | Arizona, USA            | US\_WEST\_3        |              |                       |
| westcentralus   | Wyoming, USA            | US\_WEST\_CENTRAL  |              |                       |
| southcentralus  | Texas, USA              | US\_SOUTH\_CENTRAL |              |                       |
| brazilsouth     | Sao Paulo, Brazil       | BRAZIL\_SOUTH      |              |                       |
| brazilsoutheast | Rio de Janeiro, Brazil  | BRAZIL\_SOUTHEAST  |              |                       |
| canadaeast      | Quebec City, QC, Canada | CANADA\_EAST       |              |                       |
| canadacentral   | Toronto, ON, Canada     | CANADA\_CENTRAL    |              |                       |
| mexicocentral   | Querétaro State, Mexico | MEXICO\_CENTRAL    |              |                       |
